cit.basis: IRAE (Impuesto a las Rentas de las Actividades Económicas) flat 25% on net business income (Título 4).
cit.note: Administered by the DGI (Dirección General Impositiva). Free-trade-zone (zona franca) companies and qualifying software/IT services enjoy broad IRAE exemptions — out of scope for this SME estimator.

free_zone.note: Zona franca users are exempt from IRAE (and most other national taxes) on qualifying activity under Ley 15.921; qualifying software development and related IT services can also be largely IRAE-exempt.

imeba.note: IMEBA (Impuesto a la Enajenación de Bienes Agropecuarios) is an alternative turnover tax on first sales of agricultural goods; small agricultural producers may opt for IMEBA instead of IRAE.

vat.note: IVA standard rate 22%; 10% reduced (tasa mínima) rate applies to e.g. basic foodstuffs, medicines, and hotel services.

net_wealth_tax.note: IP (Impuesto al Patrimonio) of 1.5% applies annually to corporate net worth located in Uruguay.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Zona-franca/software exemptions, IMEBA option, IP, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
